I

IGame - Interface in com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida.model.game
Interface defining the core game logic contract for the Escritura Rapida typing game.
INITIAL_TIME - Static variable in class com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida.model.time.TimeManager
The initial time in seconds assigned at the start of the game.

Initializes the game controller.

Initializes the countdown timer for the given level.

Initializes the countdown timer for the given level.

Returns whether the game has ended in a loss.

Returns whether the game has ended in a loss.
isGameWon() - Method in class com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida.model.game.Game
Checks whether the player has won the game.
isGameWon() - Method in interface com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida.model.game.IGame
Checks whether the player has won the game.
isTimeUp() - Method in class com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida.model.game.Game
Checks whether the countdown timer has reached zero.

Checks whether the countdown timer has reached zero.

Checks whether the countdown timer has reached zero.
